memberdef.name: MAIN_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Select \"Advanced Options\" to see all options." )

memberdef.name: AFILTER_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Audio filters are used to process the audio stream." )

memberdef.name: AOUT_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_("General settings for audio output modules.")

memberdef.name: VOUT_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_("General settings for video output modules.")

memberdef.name: VFILTER_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_("Video filters are used to process the video stream." )

memberdef.name: SUBPIC_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Settings related to On-Screen-Display,"\ " subtitles and \"overlay subpictures\"")

memberdef.name: SPLITTER_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_("Video splitters separate the stream into multiple videos.")

memberdef.name: INPUT_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Settings for input, demultiplexing, " \ "decoding and encoding")

memberdef.name: ACCESS_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Settings related to the various access methods. " \ "Common settings you may want to alter are HTTP proxy or " \ "caching settings." )

memberdef.name: STREAM_FILTER_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Stream filters are special modules that allow advanced operations on " \ "the input side of VLC. Use with care..." )

memberdef.name: DEMUX_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Demuxers are used to separate audio and video streams." )

memberdef.name: VDEC_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Settings for the video, images or video+audio decoders and encoders." )

memberdef.name: ADEC_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Settings for the audio-only decoders and encoders." )

memberdef.name: SDEC_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Settings for subtitle, teletext and CC decoders and encoders." )

memberdef.name: ADVANCED_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "General input settings. Use with care..." )

memberdef.name: SOUT_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Stream output settings are used when acting as a streaming server " \ "or when saving incoming streams.\n" \ "Streams are first muxed and then sent through an \"access output\" "\ "module that can either save the stream to a file, or stream " \ "it (UDP, HTTP, RTP/RTSP).\n" \ "Sout streams modules allow advanced stream processing (transcoding, "\ "duplicating...).")

memberdef.name: SOUT_MUX_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Muxers create the encapsulation formats that are used to " \ "put all the elementary streams (video, audio, ...) " \ "together. This setting allows you to always force a specific muxer. " \ "You should probably not do that.\n" \ "You can also set default parameters for each muxer." )

memberdef.name: SOUT_ACO_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Access output modules control the ways the muxed streams are sent. " \ "This setting allows you to always force a specific access output method. " \ "You should probably not do that.\n" \ "You can also set default parameters for each access output.")

memberdef.name: SOUT_PACKET_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( \ "Packetizers are used to \"preprocess\" the elementary "\ "streams before muxing. " \ "This setting allows you to always force a packetizer. " \ "You should probably not do that.\n" \ "You can also set default parameters for each packetizer." )

memberdef.name: SOUT_STREAM_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Sout stream modules allow to build a sout " \ "processing chain. Please refer to the Streaming Howto for " \ "more information. You can configure default options for " \ "each sout stream module here.")

memberdef.name: SOUT_VOD_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "VLC's implementation of Video On Demand" )

memberdef.name: PLAYLIST_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_( "Settings related to playlist behaviour " \ "(e.g. playback mode) and to modules that automatically add "\ "items to the playlist (\"service discovery\" modules).")

memberdef.name: SD_HELP
memberdef.initializer: N_("Services discovery modules are facilities "\ "that automatically add items to playlist.")
